message:
fix(codegen): Fix array vs ArrayList consistency in type handling

Multiple fixes to ensure type inference and codegen produce consistent types:

1. All list literals now become ArrayList (not fixed arrays) to match
   type inference which always returns .list type

2. Fix pyOr/pyAnd to use PyValue.isTruthy() instead of pyTruthy(*PyObject)

3. Add bytes case to PyValue.isTruthy() switch

4. Fix pyContains to handle array types without .items access
   - Arrays use &arr to get slice
   - ArrayLists use .items

5. Verify arraylist_vars entries are actually list/array types before
   using list membership path (handles variable reuse x=[1] then x={1:2})

files.patch:
@@ -81,6 +81,7 @@ pub const PyValue = union(enum) {
             .int => |v| v != 0,
             .float => |v| v != 0.0,
             .string => |v| v.len > 0,
+            .bytes => |v| v.data.len > 0,
             .none => false,
             .list => |v| v.len > 0,
             .tuple => |v| v.len > 0,
